sources.title_original: Non-destructive measurement method and apparatus for the turn-to-turn resistivity distribution in non-insulation superconducting coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Discloses measuring the spatial turn-to-turn resistivity distribution (TTRD) inside an NI HTS coil non-destructively -- the conduction map CF-3 proposes to act upon -- but appears to stop at measurement, not active steering.

Selectively removes conductive cladding from HTS tape edges in a spatially-graded way to keep I/Ic approximately constant across coil regions, a passive geometry-engineered analog of steering current away from over-stressed regions (field-profile-driven, not cooling-path-driven).

sources.title_original: No-insulation multi-width winding for high temperature superconducting magnets
sources.relevance_sentence: Varies HTS tape width turn-by-turn to equalize I/Ic and steer current density across the coil, a fixed-at-winding-time (not actively controlled, not thermally-mapped) current-steering mechanism.

sources.title_original: High-Temperature Superconducting Coil Having Smart Insulation, High-Temperature Superconducting Wire Used Therefor, and Manufacturing Method Therefor
sources.relevance_sentence: Metal-insulator-transition material layer between turns is insulating at operating temperature and becomes conductive above a transition temperature, an intrinsic materials-physics analog of temperature-triggered current bypass without an externally measured spatial thermal map.

sources.assignee: Florida State University Research Foundation, Inc.
sources.status: US11,094,438 granted 2021-08-17; US11,551,840 granted (continuation); US20220102040A1 published application (further continuation)
sources.title_original: Feedback control for no-insulation high-temperature superconducting magnet
sources.relevance_sentence: Discloses an active PI feedback controller adjusting the bulk external power-supply current of an NI HTS magnet based on measured-vs-reference global field -- active current control of an NI magnet is already claimed, though as a single global knob, not spatial/turn-level redistribution driven by a thermal-conduction map.

Insulating layer between turns has spatially-staggered conductive windows creating deliberate, geometrically-placed current paths of controlled resistance -- the closest architectural match found for engineering turn-to-turn bypass sites at specific spatial locations to control current distribution and local heating.

sources.title_original: HTS Linked Partial Insulation for HTS Field Coils
sources.relevance_sentence: HTS 'bridges' placed at specific spatial locations self-regulate as current limiters so that faster-quenching regions push current toward slower-quenching (cooler) regions -- functionally close to redirecting current away from thermally weak spots, but reactive/self-regulating via local Tc physics rather than driven by a known cold-head conduction map.

A heating device imposes a customized, spatially-varying temperature profile across the coil (radially, per turn's threshold-current profile) to equalize critical current and suppress screening-current-field effects -- an engineered thermal map used to shape coil electromagnetic behavior, though heater-imposed and SCF-focused rather than cooling-path-driven and hot-spot-focused.

sources.venue: PMC / IEEE Trans. Applied Superconductivity / MIT DSpace
sources.title_original: Hot-Spot Modeling of REBCO NI Pancake Coil: Analytical and Experimental Approaches
sources.relevance_sentence: Analytical/experimental hot-spot temperature modeling in NI pancake coils; foundational background physics for predicting where hot spots form.

sources.title_original: Control of turn-to-turn contact resistivity in resistively insulated REBCO coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Title directly suggests engineered/active control of turn-to-turn contact resistivity, closely adjacent to CF-3's mechanism; full text not machine-readable this session (gap, needs re-fetch).

sources.title_original: Explicit Turn Resolution with Anisotropic Homogenisation for Efficient 3D Magneto-Thermal Finite-Element Simulation of Large-Scale No-Insulation HTS Magnets
sources.relevance_sentence: Simulation-tool background for predicting current redistribution in NI coils; not itself a steering mechanism.

sources.title_original: Surface Contact Approximation for Magneto-Thermal Finite Element Analysis of No-Insulation HTS Coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Simulation methodology for magneto-thermal contact behavior in NI coils; background modeling capability.

sources.title_original: Electromagnetic-thermal-mechanical characteristics with active feedback control in a high-temperature superconducting no-insulation magnet
sources.relevance_sentence: Physics/safety analysis of the same PI active feedback control family as CF3-005 (global, not spatial, current control).

sources.title_original: Determining Operating Current of No-insulation Field Coil in HTS Generators
sources.relevance_sentence: Addresses appropriate operating current given turn-to-turn bypass behavior; adjacent background art.

sources.title_original: Current Bypassing and Transient Stability in a Partially Insulated HTS Coil
sources.relevance_sentence: Documents current bypassing behavior in partially-insulated coils under transient conditions; establishes NPL literature on bypass-site behavior independent of the Tokamak Energy patent family.

sources.title_original: Electromagnetic behaviour and thermal stability of a conduction-cooled, no-insulated 2G-HTS coil at intermediate temperatures
sources.relevance_sentence: Directly on point for CF-3's physical operating regime (conduction-cooled + NI coil + thermal stability); core background/comparator art, does not itself claim active spatial current steering.

sources.title_original: Turn-to-Turn Contact Resistance Measurement of No-Insulation REBCO Pancake Coil: External Field Dependence
sources.relevance_sentence: Measurement methodology background corroborating CF3-001's (US12,196,792) territory.

sources.title_original: Experimental and numerical study on current distribution in parallel co-wound no-insulation coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Documents non-uniform current distribution among co-wound tapes; background phenomenon, no steering claim identified.

sources.title_original: Superconducting magnet apparatus and control method thereof
sources.relevance_sentence: Bulk on/off switch (bellows/gas-pressure or shape-memory-alloy) for external power to a superconducting coil; low relevance to turn-level thermal-map-based steering, logged for candor because it surfaced under the active-control query cluster and touches temperature-responsive switching.
